title: melica minuta subsp. saxatilis
intro: Melica minuta subsp. saxatilis, also known as saxatile melic grass, is a subspecies of the Melica minuta plant, a type of grass native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments in traditional folk medicine.
